CONTENT.Club career: Keita is a youth product of the Reims youth academy. He began his senior career with their reserves in 2020. On 30 October 2022, he made his senior and professional debut with Reims in a 2–1 Ligue 1 win over Auxerre on 23 October 2022.On 4 July 2024, Keita signed a contract with Charleroi in Belgium for three seasons, with an optional fourth.
CONTENT.International career: Born in France, Keita holds French and Malian nationalities. He is a youth international for France, having played up to the France U20s.

SUMMARY: Cheick Keita (born 2 April 2003) is a French professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Belgian club Charleroi.
